headline: Man's LinkedIn Post About 'Hustle Culture' Is Exposed As AI-Generated, He's Now 'Hustling' To Save Face
summary: 'I wrote it,' Jake said. ChatGPT disagreed. 'We collaborated,' Jake said. 'You copy-pasted,' his boss said.
fullBody: Jake LinkedIn posted an inspirational 'hustle culture' thread. It was generated by ChatGPT. 'I curated it,' Jake said. His boss asked about 'his words.' 'They're a collaboration,' Jake said. 'With who?' his boss asked. 'Technology,' Jake said. Jake has since hired a ghostwriter. The ghostwriter is also AI. Jake is now 'curating' his apology. The apology is also AI. 'I'm at the forefront of innovation,' Jake said. 'You're at the forefront of laziness,' his boss said.
